question: How much does roof repair cost in Manchester?
answer: Roof repair costs vary depending on the extent of damage. Minor repairs typically start from £150, while larger jobs can range from £500–£2,000+. We provide free, no-obligation quotes so you know exactly what to expect before any work begins.

question: Are you fully insured?
answer: Yes, we carry £5 million public liability insurance and full employer's liability cover. We're also TrustMark registered and Checkatrade approved, so you can be confident you're in safe hands.

question: Do you offer emergency roofing services?
answer: Absolutely. We offer 24/7 emergency roof repair services across Manchester. In most cases, we can be with you within 60 minutes of your call to make your property safe and watertight.

question: What guarantee do you provide?
answer: All our work comes with a 10-year written guarantee on workmanship. We also use manufacturer-backed materials with their own warranties, giving you double protection and complete peace of mind.

question: What areas of Manchester do you cover?
answer: We cover all of Greater Manchester including Manchester city centre, Didsbury, Chorlton, Sale, Altrincham, Stockport, Salford, Bolton, Bury, Rochdale, Oldham, and all surrounding areas within a 25-mile radius.
